commands: yarn run openapi-generator-cli generate --git-repo-id=daytona --git-user-id=daytonaio -i dist/apps/api/openapi.json -g csharp --additional-properties=packageName=Daytona.ApiClient,targetFramework=net8.0,nullableReferenceTypes=true,library=httpclient,useOneOfDiscriminatorLookup=true -o {projectRoot}/src
